transcript_preview: 3.19. Klausies un atbildi. Labdien, Juri! Sveiks, Oskar! Kā tev iet? Paldies, labi! Vai tu esi mājās? Nē, es vēl esmu darbā. Vai tu vakar biji stadionā? Nē, es vakar gāju uz kino. Uz kurieni tu iesi sveidien? Rītes iešu uz baznīcu.
translation_preview: 3.19. Listen and answer. Hello, Juris! Hey, Oskar! How are you? Thank you, okay. Are you home? No, I'm still at work. Were you at the stadium yesterday? No, I went to cinema yesterday. Where are you going? I'm going to church.
